name: @loadout/plugin-input-plumber
description: Install InputPlumber on distros that don't ship it natively (CachyOS, mutable Fedora, atomic Fedora variants without IP in the base image).
author: Loadout

plugin.name: InputPlumber
plugin.description: Install the InputPlumber input-routing daemon — no-op if a system package or a previous run already installed it
plugin.subtitle: Input routing daemon
